title: PermissionExporter
description: Ever wanted to export all your permissions into 1 easy to read txt document? well now you can :)
body:
📦 PermissionExporter
Ever wanted to see a clean list of all the permissions used by your plugins — all in one place?
PermissionExporter makes that possible. This lightweight, effective tool is perfect for Minecraft server admins and plugin developers who want an organized snapshot of every registered permission on their server.

🔧 Features
📄 Exports all registered permissions currently loaded on the server

📁 Automatically organizes them by plugin name

📌 Groups unknown or uncategorized permissions under an [Unknown] section

📍 Saves to permissions_export.txt in the plugin's data folder

🔐 Requires permissionexporter.export permission to run

📦 Usage
Run this command in-game or from the console: /exportperms

A categorized .txt file will be generated, making permission auditing and management easier than ever.

✅ Compatible with Minecraft 1.20.6 – 1.21.5
🔜 More version support and new features coming soon!
